q2.content: In the United States, there is a lot of debate about how workers could be better supported. Through this interview, I would like to understand your own experiences with work and capture your thoughts on how you would be better supported.

q3.content: The results from this interview and other participants' interviews will be used to create recommendations for how workers could be better supported.

q4.content: In a few weeks, you will return to view and vote on the recommendations generated from this process.

q5.content: As a reminder, please do not include any personally identifiable information, such as your name or specific addresses, in your answer.

q6.content: Finally, feel free to take a moment to think and reflect before answering any questions. For example, we know that thinking of specific memories or experiences can take some time, so there is no need to rush. Even if you need a minute or two to gather your thoughts before answering any question, that's fine.

q7.content: Thank you for your time and input!
